## RPC contract

| RPC | gRPC | REST |
|-----|------|------|
| GatewayService/Create | (CreateGatewayRequest) → operation.Operation | POST /vpc/v1/gateways |
| GatewayService/Delete | (DeleteGatewayRequest) → operation.Operation | DELETE /vpc/v1/gateways/{gateway_id} |
| GatewayService/Get | (GetGatewayRequest) → Gateway | GET /vpc/v1/gateways/{gateway_id} |
| GatewayService/List | (ListGatewaysRequest) → ListGatewaysResponse | GET /vpc/v1/gateways |
| GatewayService/ListOperations | (ListGatewayOperationsRequest) → ListGatewayOperationsResponse | GET /vpc/v1/gateways/{gateway_id}/operations |
| GatewayService/Move | (MoveGatewayRequest) → operation.Operation | POST /vpc/v1/gateways/{gateway_id}:move |
| GatewayService/Update | (UpdateGatewayRequest) → operation.Operation | PATCH /vpc/v1/gateways/{gateway_id} |
